name: phar-mcp
description: Stdio MCP server for phar.gg / Pharaoh DEX contract reads and unsigned transaction calldata.

scripts.validate:mixed-route:report: sh -c 'test -n "$PHAR_MCP_LIVE_CONFIRM" || { echo "PHAR_MCP_LIVE_CONFIRM is required" >&2; exit 1; }; LIVE_BROADCAST=1 PHAR_MCP_PHASES=mixed_route_exact_in node scripts/fork-rehearsal.mjs > reports/mixed-route-live.latest.json'
scripts.validate:fork:reports: npm run rehearse:reward-claims:report && npm run rehearse:fork:report && npm run rehearse:mixed-route:report && npm run rehearse:vote:report && npm run rehearse:pool-creation:report
scripts.validate:live:report: sh -c 'test -n "$PHAR_MCP_LIVE_CONFIRM" || { echo "PHAR_MCP_LIVE_CONFIRM is required" >&2; exit 1; }; LIVE_BROADCAST=1 node scripts/fork-rehearsal.mjs > reports/live-broadcast.latest.json'
scripts.validate:p33:report: sh -c 'test -n "$PHAR_MCP_LIVE_CONFIRM" || { echo "PHAR_MCP_LIVE_CONFIRM is required" >&2; exit 1; }; LIVE_BROADCAST=1 PHAR_MCP_PHASES=phar_xphar_p33_roundtrip node scripts/fork-rehearsal.mjs > reports/p33-live.latest.json'
scripts.validate:p33-mint-withdraw:report: sh -c 'test -n "$PHAR_MCP_LIVE_CONFIRM" || { echo "PHAR_MCP_LIVE_CONFIRM is required" >&2; exit 1; }; LIVE_BROADCAST=1 PHAR_MCP_PHASES=p33_mint_withdraw_roundtrip node scripts/fork-rehearsal.mjs > reports/p33-mint-withdraw-live.latest.json'
scripts.validate:vote:report: sh -c 'test -n "$PHAR_MCP_LIVE_CONFIRM" || { echo "PHAR_MCP_LIVE_CONFIRM is required" >&2; exit 1; }; LIVE_BROADCAST=1 node scripts/vote-validation.mjs > reports/vote-live.latest.json'
scripts.validate:gated-readonly: npm run build && npm run state:validation-readiness:report
scripts.validate:readonly:reports: npm run build && npm run smoke:mcp:report && npm run state:wallet:report && npm run state:live-receipts:report && npm run state:live-traces:report && npm run state:rewards:report && npm run state:claimability:report && npm run state:pool-discovery:report && npm run state:cl-quotes:report && npm run state:registry-coverage:report && npm run state:autovault-provenance:report && npm run state:source-provenance:report && npm run state:token-anchors-provenance:report && npm run state:official-anchors-provenance:report && npm run state:dlmm-provenance:report && npm run state:reward-fixtures:report && npm run state:operator-incentives:report && npm run state:protocol-gates:report && npm run state:validation-readiness:report && npm run diff:abi:report
scripts.validate:reports: npm run validate:readonly:reports && node scripts/run-fork-validation.mjs && npm run reports:acceptance-audit && npm run smoke:mcp:report && npm run reports:integrity
